results.text: William Håkansson - Stats, Contract, Salary & More. Eliteprospects.com hockey player profile of William Håkansson, 2007-10-08 Solna, SWE Sweden. Most recently in the SHL with Luleå HF. Complete player biography and stats. William Håkansson- 2026 NHL Draft Prospect Profile. William Håkansson may not be the flashiest defenseman in the 2026 NHL Draft, but has the potential to be one of the better shutdown prospects.
